name: logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, unpredicted vehicle breakdowns cause service delays. We predict breakdowns and schedule service instead of manual scheduling and reactive maintenance.
problem_solved: unpredicted vehicle breakdowns leading to service delays
